meaning: 维苏威火山[意大利西南部](欧洲大陆唯一的活火山)
examples: It was the volcanoes Vesuvius and Etna that she meant.
Vesuvius isn't the only active volcano threatening this densely-populated area.
Related news: "Vesuvius Magma Chamber Rising; May Mean Milder Eruption" [September 10, 2008].
The two cities on Italy's southern coast were buried following the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in AD79.
Society ignoring our reliance on oil is like the people of Pompeii ignoring the rumblings below Vesuvius.
